description: Golden trace for signal argument-forwarding parity. Godot forwards all Variant arguments to each connected callback identically.
scenario: Emitter sends (Int(42), String('hello'), Bool(true)) via data_signal to two receivers. Each receiver gets the full argument list. Trace records one SignalEmit per emission.
notes: Each callback receives an independent copy of the argument slice. Argument identity is verified per-receiver.
